synopsis.value: Due to an accident she had in her past, 30-year-old  Yuri Motomiya (Fumi Nikaido) has a special telepathic ability. When she looks into someone's eyes, she can hear their innermost thoughts. She often gets hurt hearing the true feelings of people that she does not want to hear. She is afraid of hearing these feelings and also showing her true feelings to others. To protect herself, she tries to keep a distance from other people whenever possible and she has given up on ever loving someone. One day, Yuri Motomiya meets Yoon Tae-O (Chae Jong-Hyeop). He is a 26-year-old Korean student studying in Japan. He has a bright and friendly personality and gets along well with other people. Yuri Motomiya happens to make eye contact with him. What she hears from him internally is a Korean voice that she doesn’t understand at all. She starts to believe she can fall for him, because she doesn't understand what she hears from his heart.
